data.name: Prostitute-Pimp 2
data.detailed_description:
The pimp simulator that challenges you to run a prostitution club is back with its new release, Prostitute Pimp 2. You'll have to get new clients by hiring new girls on the street, buying new nightclubs, and upgrading your clubs.

You can talk to the girls and even have sex with them.

Your club doesn't just have strippers and prostitutes, you also sell drugs that you'll have to get to earn even more money. But be careful with the police because they'll put you in jail for your illegal activities.

(All women are over 18 and work at the club of their own free will)

-Manage a nightclub just like in real life, hire girls, buy drinks, and spend money to improve your club with new areas.

-Drive your car around the city and spend your money on tuning it up.

-Buy houses and different nightclubs.

-Manage your money and invest it in improving your club and keeping your girls happy.

-Control profits and expenses with contracts to generate as much money as possible.

-Go out on the streets to find new girls and drugs while escaping from the police.

-You can have sex with your girls for a small fee.

Become the owner of the city and become a millionaire!

data.short_description: The pimp simulator that challenges you to run a prostitution club is back with its new release, Prostitute Pimp 2. You'll have to get new clients by hiring new girls on the street, buying new nightclubs, and upgrading your clubs.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 俄文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: i7 4790k or greater
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce GTX 1060 | AMD Radeon HD 6870
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: i7 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 12 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce GTX 3060 | AMD Radeon HD 6870 or greater
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 / 11
  • Processor: i7 4790k or greater
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce GTX 1060 | AMD Radeon HD 6870
  • Storage: 10 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10 / 11
  • Processor: i7 or equivalent
  • Memory: 12 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce GTX 3060 | AMD Radeon HD 6870 or greater
  • Storage: 10 GB available space
